name: ChatVLSC Staged Configuration Verification
risk_policy: Proceed with changes below risk level 9 when they do not expose credentials, secrets, passwords, tokens, refresh tokens, client secrets, certificates, or recovery codes.

five_passes.name: Inventory
checks: Nested brain-slushie checkout is synced with origin/main.
GitHub connector has admin, push, pull, maintain, and triage permissions.
Wrangler local shell is not authenticated.
No Cloudflare, Graph, OpenAI, or GitHub token is present in local environment variables or .dev.vars.
OpenAI Platform API-key target discovery is exposed but rejected by the connected account.

five_passes.name: Safe-change selection
checks: Only read-only and documentation-facing Worker metadata was selected for implementation.
No credentials, tokens, private keys, refresh tokens, client secrets, or recovery codes are added to source.
No DNS, Access, Entra, OpenAI, or Zapier permission mutation is attempted without an available authorized API path.

five_passes.name: Verification
checks: Probe live security, identity, staged, and ChatGPT readiness endpoints after deployment.

five_passes.name: Documentation
checks: Update Notion progress log with applied changes and gates.
Keep Entra app-registration write status current.
Keep Cloudflare and OpenAI status explicit rather than inferred.

current_gates.cloudflare_deploy: Wrangler is not authenticated in the local shell and no local Cloudflare token is present.
current_gates.cloudflare_account_wide_changes: Cloudflare plugin namespace is not exposed in this session; use local Wrangler/API credentials when available.
current_gates.entra_app_registration_write: Microsoft Graph write requires Application.ReadWrite.All or Application Administrator / Cloud Application Administrator rights.
current_gates.openai_chatgpt_app_creation: OpenAI Platform connector target discovery was rejected by the connected account.
current_gates.zapier_entra_execution: Zapier/Entra tools are not exposed in this session.
